mapper.select: SELECT id, name, name_cn AS nameCn FROM bangumi_subject where type = #{type} AND (name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN name_cn LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, `rank` IS NULL, `rank` ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.subject_id AS subjectId, r.relation_type AS relationType, r.`order`, s.id, s.type, s.name, s.name_cn AS nameCn, s.infobox, s.platform, s.summary, s.nsfw, s.tags, s.meta_tags AS metaTags, s.score, s.score_details AS scoreDetails, s.`rank`, s.date, s.favorite, s.series, s.images FROM bangumi_subject_relation r JOIN bangumi_subject s ON r.related_subject_id = s.id WHERE r.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY r.`order`, r.related_subject_id
